name: Circus Dog Mustard (Barnard)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium-low heat.
2. Cook the onion and green pepper, stirring often, until softened and tinged with gold, about 10 minutes.
3. Add garlic and celery seeds; cook for S minutes.
4. Stir in the mustard and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes to blend flavors.
The mustard sauce can be used immediately or cooled and refrigerated, covered, for up to 2 days. Reheat gently before use.
Notes: Makes about 2 cups. Use for hot dogs and hamburgers, pork chops, spareribs, fish steaks like salmon or swordfish, or shrimp.
